meta.scope: Documented standard NMOS 6502 opcodes only; undocumented opcode slots are empty objects.

field_notes.class: Opcode execution class. This is the key that should select a microcode flow template.
field_notes.cycles: [min, max]. Branches and indexed read modes may vary by condition/page crossing.
field_notes.flags: Optional short behavioral notes useful for generation or validation.

ADC.summary: Add memory operand and carry flag to A; updates N, V, Z, C.

AND.summary: Logical AND between A and memory operand; stores result in A; updates N and Z.

ASL.summary: Shift accumulator or memory operand left by one bit; old bit 7 goes to C; updates N and Z.

BCC.summary: Branch relative if carry flag is clear.

BCS.summary: Branch relative if carry flag is set.

BEQ.summary: Branch relative if zero flag is set.

BIT.summary: Test bits in memory against A; sets Z from A&M, and copies memory bits 7 and 6 into N and V.

BMI.summary: Branch relative if negative flag is set.

BNE.summary: Branch relative if zero flag is clear.

BPL.summary: Branch relative if negative flag is clear.

BRK.summary: Force interrupt sequence; pushes PC and status, sets break state, and loads the IRQ/BRK vector.

BVC.summary: Branch relative if overflow flag is clear.

BVS.summary: Branch relative if overflow flag is set.

CMP.summary: Compare A with memory operand; updates N, Z, C without changing A.

CPX.summary: Compare X with memory operand; updates N, Z, C without changing X.

CPY.summary: Compare Y with memory operand; updates N, Z, C without changing Y.

DEC.summary: Decrement memory operand by one; updates N and Z.

DEX.summary: Decrement X by one; updates N and Z.

DEY.summary: Decrement Y by one; updates N and Z.

EOR.summary: Exclusive OR between A and memory operand; stores result in A; updates N and Z.

INC.summary: Increment memory operand by one; updates N and Z.

INX.summary: Increment X by one; updates N and Z.

INY.summary: Increment Y by one; updates N and Z.

JMP.summary: Load PC with the target address.

JSR.summary: Push return address to stack and jump to subroutine target.

LDA.summary: Load A from memory operand; updates N and Z.

LDX.summary: Load X from memory operand; updates N and Z.

LDY.summary: Load Y from memory operand; updates N and Z.

LSR.summary: Shift accumulator or memory operand right by one bit; old bit 0 goes to C; updates N and Z.

NOP.summary: No operation; consumes cycles without changing registers or flags.

ORA.summary: Logical OR between A and memory operand; stores result in A; updates N and Z.

PLA.summary: Pull A from stack; updates N and Z.

ROL.summary: Rotate accumulator or memory operand left through C; updates N, Z, C.

ROR.summary: Rotate accumulator or memory operand right through C; updates N, Z, C.

RTI.summary: Pull processor status and PC from stack to return from interrupt.

RTS.summary: Pull return address from stack, increment it, and continue after JSR.

SBC.summary: Subtract memory operand and inverse carry from A; updates N, V, Z, C.

TAX.summary: Transfer A to X; updates N and Z.

TAY.summary: Transfer A to Y; updates N and Z.

TSX.summary: Transfer stack pointer to X; updates N and Z.

TXA.summary: Transfer X to A; updates N and Z.

TYA.summary: Transfer Y to A; updates N and Z.

r_imm.summary: Read-class instruction using an immediate operand.

r_abx.summary: Read-class instruction using absolute,X addressing; may include page-cross correction.

r_aby.summary: Read-class instruction using absolute,Y addressing; may include page-cross correction.

r_izy.summary: Read-class instruction using indirect-indexed addressing, (zp),Y; may include page-cross correction.

w_abx.summary: Write-class instruction using absolute,X addressing; fixed write timing.

w_aby.summary: Write-class instruction using absolute,Y addressing; fixed write timing.

w_izy.summary: Write-class instruction using indirect-indexed addressing, (zp),Y; fixed write timing.

acc.summary: Accumulator operation; the instruction operates on A rather than memory.

imp.summary: Implicit/register instruction with no operand bytes.

branch_rel.summary: Conditional relative branch; cycles depend on branch taken and page crossing.

Implicit.summary: Operand is implied by the instruction; no explicit operand byte is encoded.

Accumulator.summary: Instruction operates directly on the accumulator, written as operand A.

Immediate.summary: The next byte is an 8-bit constant operand.

Zero Page.summary: The operand byte is an address in $0000-$00FF.

Zero Page,X.summary: The operand byte is added to X with zero-page wraparound.

Zero Page,Y.summary: The operand byte is added to Y with zero-page wraparound; used by LDX and STX.

Relative.summary: The operand byte is a signed branch displacement relative to the PC after the branch instruction.

Absolute.summary: Two operand bytes form a full 16-bit address.

Absolute,X.summary: A 16-bit base address is indexed by X; read instructions may need an extra cycle on page crossing.

Absolute,Y.summary: A 16-bit base address is indexed by Y; read instructions may need an extra cycle on page crossing.

Indirect.summary: Used by JMP; the operand address points to the 16-bit jump target.

(Indirect,X).summary: The operand byte is indexed by X in zero page, then used as a pointer to the effective address.

(Indirect),Y.summary: The operand byte points to a zero-page address pair; Y is added to the resulting address.

0x00.summary: Force interrupt sequence; pushes PC and status, sets break state, and loads the IRQ/BRK vector.

0x01.summary: Logical OR between A and memory operand; stores result in A; updates N and Z.

0x05.summary: Logical OR between A and memory operand; stores result in A; updates N and Z.

0x06.summary: Shift accumulator or memory operand left by one bit; old bit 7 goes to C; updates N and Z.

0x09.summary: Logical OR between A and memory operand; stores result in A; updates N and Z.

0x0A.summary: Shift accumulator or memory operand left by one bit; old bit 7 goes to C; updates N and Z.

0x0D.summary: Logical OR between A and memory operand; stores result in A; updates N and Z.

0x0E.summary: Shift accumulator or memory operand left by one bit; old bit 7 goes to C; updates N and Z.

0x10.summary: Branch relative if negative flag is clear.

0x11.summary: Logical OR between A and memory operand; stores result in A; updates N and Z.

0x15.summary: Logical OR between A and memory operand; stores result in A; updates N and Z.

0x16.summary: Shift accumulator or memory operand left by one bit; old bit 7 goes to C; updates N and Z.

0x19.summary: Logical OR between A and memory operand; stores result in A; updates N and Z.

0x1D.summary: Logical OR between A and memory operand; stores result in A; updates N and Z.

0x1E.summary: Shift accumulator or memory operand left by one bit; old bit 7 goes to C; updates N and Z.

0x20.summary: Push return address to stack and jump to subroutine target.

0x21.summary: Logical AND between A and memory operand; stores result in A; updates N and Z.

0x24.summary: Test bits in memory against A; sets Z from A&M, and copies memory bits 7 and 6 into N and V.

0x25.summary: Logical AND between A and memory operand; stores result in A; updates N and Z.

0x26.summary: Rotate accumulator or memory operand left through C; updates N, Z, C.

0x29.summary: Logical AND between A and memory operand; stores result in A; updates N and Z.

0x2A.summary: Rotate accumulator or memory operand left through C; updates N, Z, C.

0x2C.summary: Test bits in memory against A; sets Z from A&M, and copies memory bits 7 and 6 into N and V.

0x2D.summary: Logical AND between A and memory operand; stores result in A; updates N and Z.

0x2E.summary: Rotate accumulator or memory operand left through C; updates N, Z, C.

0x30.summary: Branch relative if negative flag is set.

0x31.summary: Logical AND between A and memory operand; stores result in A; updates N and Z.

0x35.summary: Logical AND between A and memory operand; stores result in A; updates N and Z.

0x36.summary: Rotate accumulator or memory operand left through C; updates N, Z, C.

0x39.summary: Logical AND between A and memory operand; stores result in A; updates N and Z.

0x3D.summary: Logical AND between A and memory operand; stores result in A; updates N and Z.

0x3E.summary: Rotate accumulator or memory operand left through C; updates N, Z, C.

0x40.summary: Pull processor status and PC from stack to return from interrupt.

0x41.summary: Exclusive OR between A and memory operand; stores result in A; updates N and Z.

0x45.summary: Exclusive OR between A and memory operand; stores result in A; updates N and Z.

0x46.summary: Shift accumulator or memory operand right by one bit; old bit 0 goes to C; updates N and Z.

0x49.summary: Exclusive OR between A and memory operand; stores result in A; updates N and Z.

0x4A.summary: Shift accumulator or memory operand right by one bit; old bit 0 goes to C; updates N and Z.

0x4C.summary: Load PC with the target address.

0x4D.summary: Exclusive OR between A and memory operand; stores result in A; updates N and Z.

0x4E.summary: Shift accumulator or memory operand right by one bit; old bit 0 goes to C; updates N and Z.

0x50.summary: Branch relative if overflow flag is clear.

0x51.summary: Exclusive OR between A and memory operand; stores result in A; updates N and Z.

0x55.summary: Exclusive OR between A and memory operand; stores result in A; updates N and Z.

0x56.summary: Shift accumulator or memory operand right by one bit; old bit 0 goes to C; updates N and Z.

0x59.summary: Exclusive OR between A and memory operand; stores result in A; updates N and Z.

0x5D.summary: Exclusive OR between A and memory operand; stores result in A; updates N and Z.

0x5E.summary: Shift accumulator or memory operand right by one bit; old bit 0 goes to C; updates N and Z.

0x60.summary: Pull return address from stack, increment it, and continue after JSR.

0x61.summary: Add memory operand and carry flag to A; updates N, V, Z, C.

0x65.summary: Add memory operand and carry flag to A; updates N, V, Z, C.

0x66.summary: Rotate accumulator or memory operand right through C; updates N, Z, C.

0x68.summary: Pull A from stack; updates N and Z.

0x69.summary: Add memory operand and carry flag to A; updates N, V, Z, C.

0x6A.summary: Rotate accumulator or memory operand right through C; updates N, Z, C.

0x6C.summary: Load PC with the target address.

0x6D.summary: Add memory operand and carry flag to A; updates N, V, Z, C.

0x6E.summary: Rotate accumulator or memory operand right through C; updates N, Z, C.

0x70.summary: Branch relative if overflow flag is set.

0x71.summary: Add memory operand and carry flag to A; updates N, V, Z, C.

0x75.summary: Add memory operand and carry flag to A; updates N, V, Z, C.

0x76.summary: Rotate accumulator or memory operand right through C; updates N, Z, C.

0x79.summary: Add memory operand and carry flag to A; updates N, V, Z, C.

0x7D.summary: Add memory operand and carry flag to A; updates N, V, Z, C.

0x7E.summary: Rotate accumulator or memory operand right through C; updates N, Z, C.

0x88.summary: Decrement Y by one; updates N and Z.

0x8A.summary: Transfer X to A; updates N and Z.

0x90.summary: Branch relative if carry flag is clear.

0x98.summary: Transfer Y to A; updates N and Z.

0xA0.summary: Load Y from memory operand; updates N and Z.

0xA1.summary: Load A from memory operand; updates N and Z.

0xA2.summary: Load X from memory operand; updates N and Z.
